text.title: AI Persona Building Workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Persona spec reads like a fictional bio; PM cannot use it for tradeoffs.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥3 cited evidence items per claim.

antipattern.symptom: Three PMs interpret the same persona differently; product decisions diverge.
antipattern.root-cause: Persona has no observable membership rules.
antipattern.fix: Add explicit rules (plan tier, language, behavioral threshold).

antipattern.symptom: Team produces 12 personas; nobody references them.
